<?php declare(strict_types=1); /* * This file is part of sebastian/lines-of-code. * * (c) Sebastian Bergmann <sebastian@phpunit.de> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace SebastianBergmann\LinesOfCode; use LogicException; final class IllogicalValuesException extends LogicException implements Exception { }
